launch_policy.safe_default: safe_launch_command uses commit_results=false by default; download the workflow artifact and promote it through ingest-production-evidence.
launch_policy.publish_mode: publish_launch_command sets commit_results=true for maintainer-controlled runs that may commit refreshed strict evidence artifacts directly.
launch_policy.secret_policy: The dispatch plan contains environment-variable placeholders and secret names only. It must not contain credential values.

jobs.title: Non-loopback Kubernetes or external HTTP service-node load
jobs.claim_unlocked: Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
issues: cluster node requires at least 4 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" -f nodes_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="32" -f memories_per_namespace="8" -f workers="8" -f batch_query_size="24" -f replication_factor="3" -f read_quorum="1" -f read_fanout="1" -f p99_slo_ms="1000" -f commit_results="false"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" -f nodes_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="32" -f memories_per_namespace="8" -f workers="8" -f batch_query_size="24" -f replication_factor="3" -f read_quorum="1" -f read_fanout="1" -f p99_slo_ms="1000" -f commit_results="true"

jobs.title: External HTTP active-active regions
issues: active-active region requires at least 3 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run external-http-active-active.yml -f regions="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" -f regions_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="16" -f p99_slo_ms="1500" -f commit_results="false"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run external-http-active-active.yml -f regions="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" -f regions_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="16" -f p99_slo_ms="1500" -f commit_results="true"

jobs.title: Managed/serverless remote telemetry
jobs.claim_unlocked: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
issues: serverless node requires at least 1 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run serverless-observed-telemetry.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" -f requests="240" -f workers="4" -f seed_memories="24" -f seed_mode="first" -f max_scale="256" -f target_rps="3200" -f target_p99_ms="500" -f external_cold_start_ms="900" -f estimated_scale_out_seconds="18" -f commit_results="false"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run serverless-observed-telemetry.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" -f requests="240" -f workers="4" -f seed_memories="24" -f seed_mode="first" -f max_scale="256" -f target_rps="3200" -f target_p99_ms="500" -f external_cold_start_ms="900" -f estimated_scale_out_seconds="18" -f commit_results="true"

jobs.title: 10M Qdrant service load
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="false" -f qdrant_url="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="true" -f qdrant_url="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL"

jobs.title: 10M sharded Qdrant service load
jobs.claim_unlocked: Horizontally sharded Qdrant service recall/latency SLO.
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-sharded-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="250.0" -f replicas="4" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="48" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="false" -f qdrant_urls="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-sharded-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="250.0" -f replicas="4" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="48" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="true" -f qdrant_urls="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS"

jobs.title: 10M pgvector service load
warnings: Ephemeral isolated service processes prove the 10M candidate-index SLO, not PostgreSQL HA or independent-node failure tolerance.
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="pgvector-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="ubuntu-latest" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="false" -f provision_pgvector_shards="true" -f pgvector_shard_count="4"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="pgvector-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="ubuntu-latest" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="true" -f provision_pgvector_shards="true" -f pgvector_shard_count="4"

jobs.title: 50M FAISS IVF-PQ streaming load
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="faiss-ivfpq-persisted" -f size="50000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="1000000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="false" -f faiss_ivfpq_path="$WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH"

jobs.title: 100M remote load result
jobs.claim_unlocked: 100M+ memories with measured sharded-Qdrant recall, p99, and cost SLO.
jobs.safe_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-sharded-service" -f size="100000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="5000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="10000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="500.0" -f replicas="8" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="128" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="false" -f qdrant_urls="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS"
jobs.publish_launch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-sharded-service" -f size="100000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="5000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="10000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="500.0" -f replicas="8" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="128" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="true" -f qdrant_urls="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS"

promotion.claim_boundary: Only artifacts that pass ingest-production-evidence and the strict production-evidence gate may unlock remote, 50M, or 100M claims.
